phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, vorrei comprare una torta di riso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, vor-RAY kom-PRAR-eh OO-na TOR-tah dee REE-zoh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Choose it directly in the display case.

responses.english: Choose it directly in the display case.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa una Veneziana alla crema, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah OO-na veh-neh-TSYAH-nah AL-lah KREH-mah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The price is on the tag.

responses.english: The price is on the tag.

phrases.text_local: A che ora aprite la mattina?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kay O-rah ah-PREE-tay lah mah-TEE-nah

likely_response.local: Alle sette e trenta, tutti i giorni.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-leh SEHT-teh EH TREHN-tah TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee

responses.phonetic: AHL-leh SEHT-teh EH TREHN-tah TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee
responses.french: Alle sette e trenta, tutti i giorni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete la sera, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah kyoo-DEH-teh lah SEH-rah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: Hours are posted at the entrance.
